/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -flto=auto -fno-fat-lto-objects -shared  -o bpe_tokenizer_cpp.cpython-312-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/bpe_tokenizer_cpp.dir/src/python_bindings.cpp.o  libbpe_tokenizer.a _deps/fmt-build/libfmt.a /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/13/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
